text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Nevermind. This and PR ports/160941 have produce broken hgfs modules.
Fixing the module so that it at least loads results in a system that
kernel panics when trying to mount hgfs (For both this version and the
one in the other PR. Need someone with more kernel programming skill
to troubleshoot and patch/fix this.

Steve
